message:
fix(mcp): clippy wildcard imports and pub(super) visibility for default fns

- Add #[allow(clippy::wildcard_imports)] to mcp_missions.rs and
  mcp_types.rs `use super::*` imports (same pattern as mcp_tools.rs)
- Change 9 serde default functions in mcp_types.rs from private to
  pub(super) so tests in the parent mcp module can access them

Verified: clippy -D warnings clean + 16,272 tests pass across
default, subprocess-bridge, mcp, mcp-client feature combinations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
